% !TeX root = ../main.tex
\chapter{Apparatus and Method}
The sensor was placed in a simulated thermal-vacuum chamber. Chamber temperature
was sampled every 10~s at five plateaus between 220 and 320~K. Voltage was
recorded in volts and time was recorded in coordinated universal time (UTC).

The calibration model was
\begin{equation}
  T(V) = a_0 + a_1 V + a_2 V^2,
  \label{eq:calibration}
\end{equation}
where the coefficients were estimated by least squares. The uncertainty budget
included reference-probe accuracy, voltage quantization, and repeatability.
